## 📋 Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines (`black`, `flake8`, `isort`)
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, ROADMAP, etc.)
- [ ] No new warnings generated
- [ ] Dependent changes are merged and published
- [ ] Type hints added (Python 3.10+)
- [ ] Docstrings follow Google style
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)

## 🔄 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature causing existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Code style/refactoring (no logic changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🧪 Test addition/modification
- [ ] 🔧 CI/CD or configuration change
